programs.title: Zamana
programs.desc: Ravi and Vinod's father is killed by a gangster for developing a photo that depicts a crime scene. Ravi, a criminal, and Vinod, a police officer, decide to exact revenge on their father's murderer.

programs.title: Be-Reham
programs.desc: Kumar Anand, an honest police officer, gets into trouble after he accidentally kills a gangster at his ex-lover Mala's house.

programs.title: Tyagi
programs.desc: Village-based Shankar makes his living as a farmer, living with his dad, and two brothers. He borrows money to fund his brothers education in the city. But once in the city they meet with the underworld and begin to carry on illegal activities.

programs.title: Qatil
programs.desc: Kumar's father is a public prosecutor and a strong advocate of the death penalty. Kumar, who opposes his father's views, decides to teach his father a lesson by implicating himself in a murder case.

programs.title: Resham Ki Dori
programs.desc: Ajit, an orphan, loves his younger sister, Rajjo, and plans on getting her married into a respectable family. Things change when he tries to save her from a sexual assault.

programs.title: Sadhna
programs.desc: Mohan, a professor, is nagged by his mother to get married. In a bid to pacify her, he comes up with a plan to fake a marriage with a woman named Rajani, unaware of her true identity.
